title: Pungent Herbal Tunisian Lamb Tagine
description: A dense and flavorful Tunisian dish featuring lamb, herbs, and spices, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This keto-friendly recipe is made with render-fat and boiling water.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until it is softened and lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the browned lamb back to the pot and pour in enough boiling water to cover the lamb.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours.
Stir in the chopped parsley and cilantro.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with additional parsley and cilantro if desired.
